title: TiCEX - Tinkers Construct EX
description: A Tinkers' Construct addon for rebuilding iconic modded gear into customizable tools, armor, and absurd cross-mod synergies.
body:
Notes: 
TiCEX is still in development.  
Features, recipes, balance, and integrations may change between versions.

Some integrations are experimental or depend on the installed mod set.

---

# TiCEX - Tinkers' Construct EX

A Tinkers' Construct addon about reconstructing gear and powers from other mods into Tinkers-style equipment.

The main goal of TiCEX is not just to add random materials or simple stat bonuses.  
It is about taking iconic items, abilities, and mechanics from other mods, then rebuilding them as Tinkers' Construct tools, armor, modifiers, traits, and special equipment.

Most progression starts from the **Reconstruction Core**.  
Craft it, combine it with items from supported mods, and branch into new modifiers, Seram equipment, and cross-mod builds.

TiCEX can be used in smaller setups, but it is especially made for players and modpacks that enjoy endgame gear progression, wild synergies, and over-the-top builds.

## Required Mods

### For All Versions
- [Tinkers' Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)

### Additional
| Version | Mods |
|--------|------|
| mc1.20.1 | AddonAPI v1.2.0 (https://modrinth.com/mod/addonapi) |

## Supported Minecraft Version
- Forge for Minecraft 1.20.1

## Main Features

- Reconstruction Core-based progression
- Seram Tools and Seram Armor
- Modifiers and traits based on other mods' gear and abilities
- Special Tinkers-style equipment such as Reforged SlashBlade, Blitz Guns, and Revival Spellbooks
- Smeltery / foundry additions such as RF Furnaces and Fluid Transmuter
- Strong support for endgame and expert-style modpacks
- Highly adjustable progression through recipes and configs

## Integrated Mods 
- Re-Avaritia
- Mekanism
- Draconic Evolution
- SlashBlade:Resharped
- Timeless and Classics:Zero
- Apotheosis
- Create
- Iron's Spells 'n SpellBook
- Psi
- Botania
- Ars Nouveau
- [WIP]CC:Tweaked
- Curios

## Other Additions

- Some cool new alloys  
- Electric modules for the smeltery and foundry that heat up based on FE input  
- Fluid Transmuter converts one fluid into another fluid with the same tag

## Details
[https://github.com/mofumofumoffy/ticex/wiki](https://github.com/mofumofumoffy/ticex/wikis)

## Balance

TiCEX can become very powerful.

That is intentional.

This mod is designed around the fantasy of taking powerful items from many mods and combining them into one customizable Tinkers' build.  
If you want a strict vanilla-style balance addon, this may not be what you are looking for.

For modpack authors, the most important progression point is the **Reconstruction Core**.  
By changing its recipe and related requirements, you can decide whether TiCEX appears early, late, or only at the very end of your pack.

## Credits

Some resources in this mod were based on materials from the mods listed in [this wiki page](https://github.com/mofumofumoffy/ticex/wiki/Modifiers-&-Traits) section.  
Additionally, it draws inspiration from the following mods:

- Materialis
- Tinkers' Evolution  
- Tinkers' SlashBlade  
- PlusTiC
